title: inner you
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Isn't it a groovy thing to be you what no one else can be?
[00:00:07.00] Isn't it a groovy thing to be you?
[00:00:14.00] Not the you that others call by name, but the inner you, the you that has scaled the ugly plastic wall
[00:00:29.00] and a scene in the grill.
[00:00:34.00] The you that nothing or no one can take away.
[00:00:39.00] Your inner light is the only thing that you're really young
[00:00:45.00] because house and books and cars and money and other material things can be taken away undestryed.
[00:00:58.00] But not the inner you.
